title: YPYMOD 2 PCS Suitcase Locks, 3 Digit Padlocks with Code Luggage Locks Padlock for Gym Locker Small Padlock Weatherproof Outdoor Padlock for Cabinets, Suitcases(Silver, Black)
features: [Product Content]-You will receive 2 cable combination locks with 3 sets of passwords, black and silver. The steel wire thickness is about 3mm, the total length of the steel wire is 135mm, and the roller password setting eliminates the worries of various key presses.

[Durable Material]-The combination padlock is made of zinc alloy. This small padlock is weatherproof and rustproof, will not discolor or fade after long-term use, and is compact and lightweight. The thickness of the steel wire lock rope is 3mm/0.12 inches, which is not easy to break and is safe and anti-theft.
[High Security]-3-digit combination padlock design, easy to remember, up to 1000 sets of password combinations, not easy to crack, higher confidentiality, very suitable for daily use.

[Easy to Use]-The 3-button combination of the combination lock is easy to set, so you don't have to worry about the safety of the key. The code can be easily set using the flip and set button below. High-quality password wheel, the gears are sturdy, smooth, wear-resistant, and non-confusing characters, which is more secure.
[Versatile Uses]-The 3-digit small combination padlock is suitable for backpacks, boxes, gym lockers, school lockers and other items with hinges to protect personal belongings.
description: Features: combination cable padlock is safe, durable, windproof. The heavy duty weatherproof 3 digit Travel Cable combination lock is windproof and safe and durable. The small combination cable padlock combination design will make you don't have to worry about losing the risk of losing the key.
